beats.label: Pelian Overview
beats.caption: Pelian AI homepage showing services and portfolio
beats.narrationText: Pelian builds AI solutions that transform businesses. Today, we'll look at FlexPay, a phone financing platform we developed.

beats.label: Our Work Section
beats.caption: Portfolio section showing client projects
beats.narrationText: Here in our portfolio, you can see several AI solutions we've delivered for clients across different industries.

beats.label: Hover FlexPay
beats.caption: FlexPay project card highlighted on hover
beats.narrationText: This is FlexPay - a fintech platform we built to streamline phone financing with AI.

beats.label: Open FlexPay
beats.caption: Clicking on the FlexPay project
beats.narrationText: Let's take a closer look at this project.

beats.label: FlexPay Details
beats.caption: FlexPay project case study page
beats.narrationText: Here's the full case study. FlexPay is an AI-powered platform that automates phone financing decisions and customer management.

beats.label: Scroll Content
beats.caption: Scrolling through FlexPay project details
beats.narrationText: The platform uses AI agents to assess credit risk, process applications, and manage customer interactions - delivering faster approvals and better user experiences.

beats.label: Summary
beats.caption: FlexPay project showcase
beats.narrationText: FlexPay demonstrates how Pelian delivers practical AI solutions that drive real business results - in this case, transforming phone financing with intelligent automation.
